title: The Great Waltz
director: Julien Duvivier, Victor Fleming, Josef von Sternberg
writer: Gottfried Reinhardt, Samuel Hoffenstein, Walter Reisch
actors: Luise Rainer, Fernand Gravey, Miliza Korjus
plot: In 1845 Vienna, Johann Strauss II (Fernand Gravey) - 'Jonahi' to his friends - would rather write and perform waltzes than anything else, this at a time when a waltz is not considered proper society music. After he is fired from h...
